name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Join the President's Trust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
You’ve been invited to become a member of our 2017 President’s Trust. |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

Whether it is the Fake News Media, the Left, the swamp, or obstructionist liberals in Congress -- **we are facing new opposition every day.**

However, that hasn't stopped us from _winning._

That's why, as a loyal supporter, you've been invited to become a member of our 2017 President's Trust.
---
| **THE PRESIDENT 'S TRUST** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a415165c8a5e7ca0281819f91116437f2f640743888dc6b3081ded28283ee3471c72ccf469a731512a866236a45eba27)** **2017 President 's Trust Membership:** **PENDING****Deadline: 11:59 PM TONIGHT** ******[ **JOIN NOW**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a415165c8a5e7ca097945cc201ef552931e8d334dd326ef36530758c337b4d34a1ae031e29933fc0f250e0f50912893e)****** I know there's no stopping our movement with the support of patriots like you.

**[So please accept your invitation by MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to join the 2017 President's Trust with a generous contribution of $1.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a415165c8a5e7ca03833d14dcef008d1d31a19888b4ab6b4fa0d02188fb78501040ee0256c81a82e18d289d2fe8e36a9)**

** Let me know you're an active supporter and in this for the long haul by joining today.**

I hope to see your name, Peter.

Thank you,
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a415165c8a5e7ca06060346e572924febfcecd6a3a38ea6b0f1505aad32374ac313bec45571c2177f0fbae668c7eddbb)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States****[ **JOIN THE PRESIDENT 'S TRUST**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a415165c8a5e7ca0696a578046fc2fcb9f57065202a444c810f80769a0aeda2af5f579b107e596aeae5961225c504336)****

name: did-you-see@dscc.org
subject: President Obama: "It's certainly frustrating"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
If we can keep fighting for five more days, the Republican window to pass Trumpcare with just 50 votes will close, and we will have won.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team --

President Obama delivered some powerful remarks about the health care fight this week:

> _" It's certainly frustrating to have to mobilize every couple of months to keep our leaders from inflicting real human suffering on our constituents. But... typically that's how progress is won. And how progress is maintained."_
President Obama is right. For the better part of eight months, we've repeatedly rallied to rebuff Republican attempts to repeal Obamacare.

That's incredibly frustrating, but it's the Republican plan: wear us down so they can ram through this dangerous piece of legislation.

But if we can keep fighting for five more days, the Republican window to pass Trumpcare with just 50 votes will close. And in doing so, we'll protect care for millions of friends, relatives, neighbors, and strangers. We will save lives.

Those are the stakes, but Democratic Senators can't do it alone. They need you.

[**Answer President Obama 's call to action. Chip in $1 right now to send an unmistakable message to Republicans that there is a price to pay for taking away health care from millions of Americans.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The truth is, the only thing standing in Republicans' way right now is Democratic Senators and our willingness to stand with them.

We all know the stakes, and time is running out before a vote.

**Every donation we receive right now sends a message to Republicans that there is a price to pay for their effort. Believe us, they 're watching. Chip in $1 today:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/protect-obamacare**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this fight,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfcb/2b07114c/11be17b3/7314687a/3327923029/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfcb/2b07114c/11be17b3/73146875/3327923029/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfcb/2b07114c/11be17b3/73146874/3327923029/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Health care update for Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
| **The Graham-Cassidy ACA repeal guts Medicaid and would hurt seniors, kids, and people with disabilities and pre-existing conditions. We 're going to fight this tooth and nail, because it's bad for Virginia and bad for the country. Add your name if you agree: **

**[ADD MY NAME](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=SjFAZyKDBMQTPgiYkwa5%2FriE1E3CZ0jH)**
---

Less than two months ago, millions of Americans breathed a sigh of relief as my colleagues and I narrowly defeated a dangerous repeal of the Affordable Care Act. We won that fight by a single vote, but it felt like we had turned a corner, and we would soon begin bipartisan efforts to reform and improve our current health care system. But here we are, 59 days later, and access to health care for millions of Americans is at risk all over again, thanks to the Graham-Cassidy bill.

GOP leaders have put a stop to productive bipartisan efforts so they can try to force an extreme bill through a rushed and secretive process. They're trying to ram this through before the Congressional Budget Office even has time to review the bill and provide estimates about its effects on health insurance. (Remember, the CBO found the last GOP repeal bill would rip coverage away from 32 million Americans.) **What we do know, even without a CBO score, is that \-- just like under past repeal bills -- millions of Americans will lose coverage they desperately need under this proposal. [This is unacceptable and downright cruel to American families -- add your name if you agree. ](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=FnlArVrfH3Up6xHCzFE%2BNLiE1E3CZ0jH)**

Here's what else we know about Graham-Cassidy: It lets states waive protections for maternity and newborn care, preventive care, treatment for mental health and substance use disorders, pediatric care, and countless other critical needs. Bottom line: Graham-Cassidy hurts millions of Americans -- especially kids, seniors, and those with pre-existing conditions -- and raises costs.

**Nearly every major health care organization in America is opposed to Graham-Cassidy -- not to mention patients and doctors. Our constituents are loud and clear on this issue. You've made your voices heard time and again as the GOP has tried over and over to strip health care from those who need it most. Now, we're facing another big fight.**

**[Sign my petition today to say you're for bipartisan, common-sense health care fixes, not a disastrous repeal and removal of coverage from millions of Americans.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=xRsxt8UlfZVUYZG%2BjDpGx7iE1E3CZ0jH)**

Thank you for your continued support.

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=vtBnN5qYHsD%2FMPS0MMvpU7iE1E3CZ0jH)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=j%2FltU7bg8yrc7dgt2XU5xbiE1E3CZ0jH).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: action-needed@dscc.org
subject: CNBC: "None of the other potential 'no' votes feel like a lock"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We can't take any false victory laps on Obamacare, team. Not when CNBC is reporting that aside from McCain, "none of the other potential 'no' votes feel like a lock."
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
_**CNBC: John McCain's no vote won't necessarily kill Graham-Cassidy health bill**_
Team,

Here's the deal: Taking a victory lap now because of John McCain's announcement could be the very thing that kills Obamacare.

**Why? Because as _CNBC_ reported, "none of the other potential [GOP] 'no' votes feel like a lock."**

[**So we 've got to keep the pressure up, team. Please, pitch in now to keep all of our ads and efforts going to stop repeal >>**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

And _CNBC_ expands on WHY we can't just rest on McCain's no vote:

> _" Rand Paul voted for the last repeal bill after consistently threatening not to; Lisa Murkowski is reportedly being offered incentives for Alaska to vote yes; and Susan Collins has stayed mostly quiet, so far saying only that she's 'leaning no.'
>
> While McCain's statement makes the bill's chances of passing slimmer, we've learned time and again during this process that it's not over until it's over."_

[**team, we need to show the GOP that grassroots Democrats will deliver consequences to anyone who supports repeal. Can you rush a contribution of $1 to fund our new ads and all our efforts to stand with Senate Democrats in this fight?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

McConnell's window to pass repeal with just 50 votes will close by next Sunday.

No one wants to sit down for coffee in a week's time to talk about how he flipped those "leaning no" votes into last-minute yes votes. Not with healthcare for 32 million Americans on the line. Not when it means the end of Medicaid as we know it. And certainly not when it means that pre-existing conditions and lifetime caps would price families and children out of the health care they need.

**Senate Democrats are standing unified in the fight to stop McConnell from taking healthcare from nearly 32 million Americans. But the fight is far from over. Please chip in now to help:**

**[http://www.dscc.org/no-false-victory-laps](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/obamacare-repeal-deadline?refcode=DPE-20170924-ActionNeed_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for standing with us,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfd3/2b07114c/11dfa64d/73146a69/986619343/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfd3/2b07114c/11dfa64d/73146a68/986619343/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dfd3/2b07114c/11dfa64d/73146a6b/986619343/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" And CNBC expands on WHY we can't just rest on McCain's no vote: " Rand Paul voted for the last repeal bill after consistently threatening not to; Lisa Murkowski is reportedly being offered incentives for Alaska to vote yes; and Susan Collins has stayed mostly quiet, so far saying only that she's 'leaning no.' While McCain's statement makes the bill's chances of passing slimmer, we've learned time and again during this process that it's not over until it's over." "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" McConnell's window to pass repeal with just 50 votes will close by next Sunday. No one wants to sit down for coffee in a week's time to talk about how he flipped those "leaning no" votes into last-minute yes votes. Not with healthcare for 32 million Americans on the line. Not when it means the end of Medicaid as we know it. And certainly not when it means that pre-existing conditions and lifetime caps would price families and children out of the health care they need. Senate Democrats are standing unified in the fight to stop McConnell from taking healthcare from nearly 32 million Americans. But the fight is far from over. Please chip in now to help: "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Thanks for standing with us, Team DSCC Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 120 Maryland Ave. NE Washington, DC 20002 Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values. If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, "". If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Will you let me know, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---

| | Peter,

Driving around Indiana in the RV last month reminded me just how people-powered this campaign is. From grabbing a bite to eat with Hoosiers in Gary to bowling with IU's Young Democrats in Bloomington -- I got to know a little bit more about the folks who make our state so great.

But, I still want to know what you think, Peter.

**[Will you take a moment to take my team's survey and let us know what you think about the campaign?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c244b/7377f838/34233b63/51fbe4ad/2738072489/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/CVGKSJB")**

You've had my back, and I want to know your thoughts when it comes to running this campaign. **We 're in this thing together and we're going to run a campaign that we can all be proud of -- but first, I have to hear from you.**

Thanks for all you do,

Joe

| ****[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c244b/7377f838/34233b63/51fbe4ac/2738072489/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-donate?refcode=20170924nodb&amount=25")****
---

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c244b/7377f838/34233b63/51fbe4af/2738072489/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
